Bash(PGPASSWORD="nefGiz-xonvi0-ninxaw" psql "postgresql://postgres.dkqywpklkcyscibitasa@aws-0-us-west-2.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres" -c "
SELECT s.id, s.\\"startTime\\", s.\\"endTime\\", s.status, s.\\"cancelledBy\\", s.\\"cancellationReason\\",
       p.\\"firstName\\" || ' ' || p.\\"lastName\\" as provider,
       st.name as session_type
FROM \\"Session\\" s
JOIN \\"Provider\\" p ON p.id = s.\\"providerId\\"
JOIN \\"SessionType\\" st ON st.id = s.\\"sessionTypeId\\"
JOIN \\"Client\\" c ON c.id = s.\\"clientId\\"
WHERE c.\\"firstName\\" = 'Olivia' AND c.\\"lastName\\" = 'Davis'
AND s.\\"startTime\\" >= '2026-03-30'
ORDER BY s.\\"startTime\\";
" 2>&1)

Bash(DIRECT_URL="postgresql://postgres.dkqywpklkcyscibitasa:nefGiz-xonvi0-ninxaw@aws-0-us-west-2.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres" psql "$DIRECT_URL" -c "SELECT c.""firstName"" || '' '' || c.""lastName"" as client, s.id, s.""startTime"", s.""endTime"", s.status, s.""cancelledBy"", p.""firstName"" || '' '' || p.""lastName"" as provider, st.name as session_type FROM ""Session"" s JOIN ""Client"" c ON c.id = s.""clientId"" JOIN ""Provider"" p ON p.id = s.""providerId"" JOIN ""SessionType"" st ON st.id = s.""sessionTypeId"" WHERE c.""firstName"" IN \(''Charlotte'', ''Aiden''\) AND c.""lastName"" IN \(''Moore'', ''Martinez''\) AND s.""startTime"" >= ''2026-04-06'' AND s.""startTime"" < ''2026-04-07'' ORDER BY c.""firstName"", s.""startTime"";")
